note: The three oracles that gate PRISM's failure claims. Honest: only the traversal (FP-direction) oracle is externally anchored; box-recall is same-modality consistency; depth is INVALID on this substrate (reported as a negative, not hidden).

oracles.name: traversal (occupancy FP on the driven path)
oracles.headline: true FP 0.000 vs shuffled 0.036 (n=1177 frames, 8 held-out free-driving logs); RELIABLE = true CI below shuffled CI. Occupancy does NOT hallucinate obstacles on space the ego physically drove through.

oracles.name: box-recall (LiDAR-seen boxes occupancy marks FREE)
oracles.headline: true miss 0.506 vs size/range-matched null 0.733 (n_interior>=5, 27 logs). RECALL-SUPPORTED but SAME-MODALITY (gates on the same LiDAR the voxelizer reads) -> internal consistency, NOT external truth; absolute count inflated by the _ROAD_Z floor-straddle confound.

oracles.name: depth-recall (frozen DAv2 metric depth as an independent recall route)
oracles.anchors: would-have externally anchored box recall -- CLOSED
oracles.headline: DAv2 median |depth - box_range| = 9.838 m > 0.5 m in the 2-30 m band -> metric scale invalid on AV2; no miss-rate reported. The externally-independent recall route is honestly CLOSED on this substrate (also: classical stereo AUC 0.259). Reported as a NEGATIVE, not buried.
